request_hint.last_user_message_contains: Every hour, check Hacker News for new posts mentioning 'IronClaw' or 'NEAR AI' a

arguments.name: Hacker News: IronClaw & NEAR AI mentions (hourly)
arguments.prompt:
Fetch the Hacker News Algolia search API for recent posts mentioning 'IronClaw' or 'NEAR AI'.

Use these two URLs:
- https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/search_by_date?query=IronClaw&tags=story&hitsPerPage=10
- https://hn.algolia.com/api/v1/search_by_date?query=NEAR+AI&tags=story&hitsPerPage=10

Filter results to only include posts created within the last 1 hour. For each matching post include: title, author, URL (or HN link: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=<objectID>), points, and number of comments.

Then send a concise Slack summary structured like this:

🔍 *Hacker News Mentions – Last Hour*

**IronClaw** (N new posts)
• [Title](link) by author — X pts, Y comments

**NEAR AI** (N new posts)
• [Title](link) by author — X pts, Y comments

If there are no new posts for a keyword in the last hour, say "No new mentions."

response.content:
All set! Here's what's been configured:

---

### ✅ Hourly HN Monitor → Slack DM

| Setting | Value |
|---|---|
| **Trigger** | Every hour at :00 (UTC) |
| **First run** | 2026-06-19 at 19:00 UTC |
| **Searches** | `IronClaw` and `NEAR AI` on Hacker News |
| **Filter** | Only posts from the last hour |
| **Delivery** | Slack DM (QA trace channel) |

**Each hourly summary will include:**
- Post title with link
- Author, points, and comment count
- Separate sections for each keyword
- "No new mentions" if nothing new was posted

To stop or modify this trigger at any time, just ask.
